See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 59322 => 'Pichincha', 59323 => 'Cotopaxi/Tungurahua/Chimborazo/Bolívar/Pastaza', 59326 => 'Carchi/Imbabura/Esmeraldas/Sucumbíos/Napo/Orellana', 59327 => 'Azuay/Cañar/Morona Santiago', 59344 => 'Guayas', 59345 => 'Manabí/Los Ríos/Galápagos', 59347 => 'Loja/El Oro/Zamora Chinchipe', ];
